mapper.select: SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, ht.avg_table_size as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_table_size DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, (ht.total_seq_scan + ht.total_idx_scan) as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY (ht.total_seq_scan + ht.total_idx_scan) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, ht.avg_bloat_percent as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', ht.collected_at) as timestamp, SUM(ht.total_seq_scan) as seq_scan, SUM(ht.total_idx_scan) as idx_scan, SUM(ht.total_tup_ins) as n_tup_ins, SUM(ht.total_tup_upd) as n_tup_upd, SUM(ht.total_tup_del) as n_tup_del FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', ht.collected_at) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT ht.table_name, ht.avg_bloat_percent as bloat_percent FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ht.table_name, ht.vacuum_delay_seconds FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.vacuum_delay_seconds DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as total_tables, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN ht.status = '정상' THEN 1 END), 0) as active_tables, COALESCE(AVG(ht.avg_cache_hit_ratio), 0) as avg_cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(ht.total_seq_scan), 0) as total_seq_scans, COALESCE(SUM(ht.total_idx_scan), 0) as total_idx_scans, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN ht.avg_bloat_percent >= 15 THEN 1 END), 0) as high_bloat_tables FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} )
